message:
feat: add GitHub social preview image (1280x640)

Generate gh_og_share_image.png from the FrankenLibC illustration
using the gh-og-share-images skill. The green Frankenstein-themed
robot with Safety Membrane, C Calls, and Rust elements provides
immediate visual recognition of the project's purpose.

To activate: GitHub Settings > Social preview > Edit > Upload

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
